results.title: NATO Summit 2026 Schedule: Check Key Timings, Events And Leaders' Meeting
results.description: NATO leaders are gathering in Ankara for the July 7-8 summit as the alliance confronts the Russia-Ukraine war, defence spending and pressure on Europe to shoulder greater military responsibility.

results.title: Afghanistan needs ‘all hands on deck’ including women, UN says
results.description: This photograph taken on June 24, 2026 shows Afghan returnees loading their belongings onto a militray truck upon their arrival... The post Afghanistan needs ‘all hands on deck’ including women, UN says appeared first on ENG.MIZZIMA.COM .

results.title: House Democrat bets anti-socialist brand can hold Trump-won seat
results.description: The Democratic Socialists of America topped 120,000 members as the United States celebrated its 250th Independence Day.
